institution.name: Our Lady of the Lake University

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Our Lady of the Lake University fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 1.1k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Our Lady of the Lake University rose 48% between 2021 and 2024 (23.2% → 34.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Our Lady of the Lake University rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 (35.0% → 46.1%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Our Lady of the Lake University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (56.3% → 62.8%).
